input_natural_language: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to NOMINAL when the system is supported and sensor data is good.

atomic_propositions.standby: True when the pilot is in control of the vehicle
atomic_propositions.apfail: Failure indication from an external source
atomic_propositions.supported: Indication of general health of system, must be True to enable operation
atomic_propositions.limits: External indication to sensor on faulty condition impeding safe operation.
atomic_propositions.good: Prior sensor output.  When false indicates a detected fault.
atomic_propositions.MODE: Autopilot internal moding discrete indicating not in transition state
atomic_propositions.REQUEST: Autopilot internal moding discrete indicating transition to a nominal operation
atomic_propositions.pullup: True when the autopilot is in the MANEUVER state
